query: Our team keeps arguing about where to put the discount-calculation logic — it's currently in both the frontend and the order service. Can you audit the data flow?
expected_behavior: Identifies the duplicated business rule as a drift risk and names it explicitly
Produces a drift-risk ranking for the duplicated rule
Recommends a single authoritative layer (e.g. order service) and explains why
Does not rewrite the code — stays at the audit and recommendation level
References the Single Source of Truth principle by name
